---
description: "Use when editing or creating i18n translation JSON files. Ensures all three languages (ca/es/en) are kept in sync with matching keys."
applyTo: "src/i18n/locales/**/*.json"
---

# i18n Translation Rules

- Every key must exist in all 3 language files: `ca/`, `es/`, `en/`
- Default language is Catalan (`ca`) — write ca first, then es, then en
- Key format: `namespace.section.key` (flat dot notation in JSON nesting)
- Never leave a key untranslated — use the English value as placeholder if unsure
- Namespaces: `common`, `exercises`, `muscles`, `planning`, `onboarding`
- When adding a new key to one language file, immediately add it to the other two
